text.title: Scope Drift Early-Warning Metrics — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the engagement instrumented for daily metric compute?

conclusion.verdict: instrument tickets + parking-lot before running the dashboard
skip — engagement too short to accumulate signal

branch.when: instrumented == true AND length >= 6w AND owner_named == false

conclusion.verdict: block — assign a named dashboard owner before publishing

branch.when: instrumented == true AND length >= 6w AND owner_named == true

conclusion.verdict: publish dashboard with named trigger actions

example.trace: ENG-42 → instrumented=true, length=14w, owner=ruslan@faion.net → publish with trigger actions
